ddls:
CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the subject */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the subject */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the subject */,
  "adverse_events" TEXT /* Any adverse events experienced by the subject during the trial */,
  "subject_status" TEXT /* Current status of the subject (e.g., Active, Withdrawn, Completed) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the subject was enrolled in the trial */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the subject completed the trial */,
  "consent_form" TEXT /* Reference to the consent form signed by the subject */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the subject (e.g., phone, email) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the subject */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the subject */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the subject */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the subject */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the subject */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the subject (e.g., Smoker, Non-smoker) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption status of the subject (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial record */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the trial (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of treatments (e.g., TRR) */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment administered (e.g., T, R) */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial period */,
  "trial_site" TEXT /* Location where the trial is conducted */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator responsible for the trial */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial (e.g., Planned, Ongoing, Completed, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pk_data" (
  "pk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PK data record */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial record */,
  "cvwr" REAL /* Coefficient of variation within subjects for reference (CVwR) */,
  "cvwt" REAL /* Coefficient of variation within subjects for test (CVwT) */,
  "cvbr" REAL /* Coefficient of variation between subjects for reference (CVbR) */,
  "cvbt" REAL /* Coefficient of variation between subjects for test (CVbT) */,
  "gmr" REAL /* Geometric mean ratio (GMR) */,
  "pk_value" REAL /* PK value (e.g., concentration) */,
  "sample_time" TEXT /* Time at which the sample was taken */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., Blood, Urine) */,
  "measured_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who measured the PK value */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the PK value was measured */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the PK value */,
  "quality_control" TEXT /* Quality control measures taken during measurement */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the PK data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pk_data_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pk_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adverse_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adverse event */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial record */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the adverse event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the adverse event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the adverse event (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the adverse event */,
  "reporter_name" TEXT /* Name of the person who reported the adverse event */,
  "reporter_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the reporter */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location where the adverse event occurred */,
  "event_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the adverse event */,
  "follow_up" TEXT /* Follow-up actions taken or required */,
  "related_to_treatment" TEXT /* Whether the adverse event is related to the treatment (e.g., Yes, No, Unknown) */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the adverse event (e.g., Recovered, Ongoing, Fatal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)
